name: ecommerce.tiktok-top-selling
description: Query TikTok hot-selling product rankings by market, category, and time period. Triggers: TikTok best sellers, top selling, hot products, leaderboard, sales ranking. Use for leaderboards, not flexible product filters or video analysis.
